title: AR Understatement — Unapplied Cash & Missing Revenue Posting
impactSummary: AR overstated by $250K due to 2 unreconciled items. Revenue potentially understated. Close certification blocked.

alerts.message: Revenue variance -$185K below threshold — posting timing issue
Close task CLT-007 blocked — AR reconciliation incomplete
Balance Sheet: AR line pending adjustment. P&L: Revenue line impacted.

closeWorkbench.blockerReason: AR reconciliation has 2 unmatched exceptions totaling $250,000. Cash application (CLT-002) must resolve exception payments before AR can be certified.

exceptions.exceptionReason: Customer payment received via ACH on Dec 10 but not applied to invoice. Cash sits in unapplied cash clearing account (1050). Remittance reference does not match invoice number due to customer PO format mismatch.
exceptions.suggestedAction: Apply receipt ACH-20241210-ACME to INV-2024-4872 in cash application. Update remittance mapping rule for Acme Corp PO format.

auditTrail.detail: ACH $175,000 from Acme Corp deposited to Chase 4521
No match found — PO reference format mismatch
Assigned to Mike Johnson for investigation

exceptions.exceptionReason: Revenue journal entry JE-ARV-412 posted $75,000 to account 4100 (Product Revenue) instead of 1200 (Accounts Receivable). Debit should be AR, credit should be Revenue. Currently only GL side shows the amount; subledger has no corresponding entry.
exceptions.suggestedAction: Post adjusting journal entry: Debit 1200 AR $75,000, Credit 4100 Revenue $75,000 to correct the original misposting. Then re-run subledger sync.

auditTrail.detail: GL shows $75K in 4100 with no AR subledger entry

impactedAccounts.name: Accounts Receivable
impactedAccounts.varianceDriver: Unapplied cash ($175K) and missing subledger posting ($75K) inflating AR balance
impactedAccounts.resolution: One item resolved via cash application, one via adjusting journal entry

impactedAccounts.name: Product Revenue
impactedAccounts.varianceDriver: Revenue posting hit wrong account — $75K recognized in Revenue but no AR offset created
impactedAccounts.resolution: Adjusting journal to correct account mapping

standardFlux.commentary: AR variance was driven by two unreconciled items totaling $250,000, primarily due to unapplied customer cash ($175K from Acme Corp) and a timing-related revenue posting issue ($75K for GlobalTech Solutions). One item was operationally resolved via cash application and one required an accounting adjustment. Final balances are now aligned.

cashFlow.note: Classification timing issue — resolved. No net cash impact.

steps.label: Assign owner and investigate root cause
Update flux commentary and attach evidence
Certify AR reconciliation and unblock close
